rules.description: 第0层词表必须与N1元指令词表一致
前置依赖校验必须为DET执行、0LLM、依赖N4转移边prerequisiteDependencies字段

outputSchema.turnType: ask | reply | complete | off-task | reply | giveup | validation_failed
outputSchema.askingField: layer0 | layer0_5 | layer1 | prerequisite_guard | layer2 | layer3 | scheduler_state | context_manager
outputSchema.changeLevelReason: null | 具体变更内容（运行时填写，major/minor时必填，1-100字）
